components.symbol_description: Pipe line label with 1:500 slope arrow, routed upward-right to HP Flare Header boundary
components.position_hint: upper left, first line from top
components.notes: Slope 1:500 indicated. NO POCKETS annotation present.

components.symbol_description: Pipe line label with 1:500 slope arrow, routed to HP Flare Header boundary
components.position_hint: upper left, second line from top
components.notes: Slope 1:500 indicated. NO POCKETS annotation present.

components.symbol_description: Pipe line label with 1:500 slope arrow, routed to HP Flare Header boundary
components.position_hint: upper left, third line from top
components.notes: Slope 1:500 indicated. NO POCKETS annotation present.

components.symbol_description: Pipe line label with 1:500 slope arrow, routed vertically to HP Flare Header boundary
components.notes: NO POCKETS annotation. Runs vertically upward center of tile.

components.symbol_description: Drawing reference arrow label box — TO HP FLARE HEADER destination
components.position_hint: upper right, repeated four times for each flare header connection
components.notes: Continuation reference to HP Flare Header drawing.

components.symbol_description: Hand valve symbol (gate/globe style) on 8" line, with spec break B01B8/B01E9
components.notes: Adjacent to 8"x6" reducer notation and spec change B01B8 to B01E9.

components.symbol_description: Concentric or eccentric reducer annotation, 8" reducing to 6"
components.notes: Reducer between 8" and 6" lines.

components.symbol_description: Flow orifice symbol (circle on pipe line)
components.notes: FO = Flush Orifice or Fixed Orifice. Tag reads FO / 0002.

components.symbol_description: Blowdown or depressurization valve symbol (circle with valve internals)
components.notes: Tag partially reads BDZV 0001. Could be a blowdown zero-velocity valve. Confirm full tag.

components.symbol_description: Temperature switch/element block label — TYPE-E, 300# rating
components.notes: Reads TSB TYPE-E 300#. May be thermowell spec or temperature switch block.

components.symbol_description: Position indicator instrument bubble (circle), in a dashed box referencing NOTE-11
components.notes: NOTE-11 box drawn around ZI0002. Position indicator likely for a valve or actuator.

components.symbol_description: Position transmitter instrument bubble (circle)
components.notes: Position transmitter for valve PV0002 per NOTE-11 reference.

components.symbol_description: Control valve (globe style) with actuator, labeled PV0002
components.notes: Pressure control valve. Spec B01E9/B01B8 change noted adjacent.

components.symbol_description: Hand valve (gate/globe) on 8" line, upstream of PV0002
components.notes: 8" hand valve with LO (Locked Open) indicator.

components.symbol_description: Hand valve (gate/globe) on 10" line, downstream of PV0002
components.notes: 10" hand valve. Spec B01E9/B01B8 noted.

components.symbol_description: Hand valve with LO (Locked Open) designation, on 8" line
components.notes: LO = Locked Open. Part of bypass/isolation arrangement around PV0002.

components.symbol_description: Hand valve with LO (Locked Open) designation, on 10" line
components.notes: LO = Locked Open. Downstream of PV0002.

components.symbol_description: Reducer annotation, 8" expanding to 10"
components.notes: Expander/reducer between PV0002 outlet (8") and downstream 10" line.

components.symbol_description: Flow orifice annotation with 300# class rating
components.notes: FO 300# label — may be orifice spec or flange rating annotation. Verify if instrument tag or annotation.

components.symbol_description: Hand valve with LC (Locked Closed) designation on 4" line
components.position_hint: lower left, near fuel gas outlet header
components.notes: LC = Locked Closed. Spec B01E9/B01B8 change noted.

components.symbol_description: Hand valve on 4" line adjacent to HV0018
components.notes: 4" valve. Part of drain/sample connection arrangement.

components.symbol_description: Pipe line label routing to Fuel Gas Treatment Package
components.position_hint: lower center, near bottom of tile
components.notes: TO FUEL GAS TREATMENT PACKAGE destination noted.

components.symbol_description: Drawing reference arrow label — TO FUEL GAS TREATMENT PACKAGE
components.notes: Destination reference to Fuel Gas Treatment Package P&ID.

components.symbol_description: Level transmitter instrument bubble, GWR (Guided Wave Radar) type
components.notes: GWR label above bubble. Part of level measurement cluster on drum.

components.symbol_description: Level transmitter instrument bubble, GWR (Guided Wave Radar) type
components.notes: GWR label above bubble. Dashed outline box suggests local panel or enclosure grouping.

components.symbol_description: Hand valve (globe/needle) on 2"×1" connection, associated with LZT0002C
components.position_hint: lower center, bottom of tile, below LZT0002C
components.notes: 2" reducing to 1" noted adjacent. Likely instrument isolation valve.

components.symbol_description: Dashed rectangle box referencing general note 11 regarding discrepancy alarm on ZI0002
components.notes: Note 11 text: discrepancy alarm raised when valve position feedback and controller output differ by more than 10%.

components.symbol_description: Pipe specification break label
components.notes: Spec break markers B01B8 and B01E9 appear repeatedly at valve/instrument boundaries.

components.symbol_description: Pipe specification break label
components.notes: Paired with B01B8 at spec change points.

components.symbol_description: Minimum distance/spacing annotation on pipe
components.notes: Dimensional requirement annotation — 600mm minimum spacing.

components.symbol_description: Low temperature warning annotation on pipe segment
components.position_hint: left-center, vertical pipe near flare lines
components.notes: Indicates low temperature service on this line. Relates to Note 7 (adiabatic depressurization).

pipes.notes: Vertical run with 1:500 slope to flare. NO POCKETS noted.
8" line from vessel/drum continuing from left tile, through HV0016/HV0017 to PV0002.
Downstream of PV0002, expands to 10" via reducer to HV0020/HV0021.
16" line to Fuel Gas Treatment Package, with 4" branch via HV0018/HV0019.
GWR level transmitter connection running toward vessel left edge, cut off.
Small bore instrument connection, 2" reducing to 1" at HV0044.

edge_components: HV0092 — left edge, continues to adjacent tile r1c2
FO0002 — left edge, continues to adjacent tile r1c2
BDZV0001 — left edge, partially cut off
HV0016 — left edge, partially cut off
LZT0002B — left edge and bottom edge, continues to adjacent tiles
HV0018/HV0019 — lower left, connections continue to adjacent tile
